title: The Beatles - Strange Fruit: The Beatles' Apple Records
subTitle: The extraordinary story of a most extraordinary record label.

title: Willie Nelson - Live at iTunes Festival
subTitle: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

title: Rock Legends
subTitle: Fronted by Eric Clapton, Cream was the prototypical power trio, playing a mix of blues, rock and psychedelia while focusing on chunky riffs and fiery guitar solos.

title: Rock Legends
subTitle: British singer/songwriter Elvis Costello extended the lyrical range of punk and new wave music with songs like Alison, Everyday I Write the Book and Veronica. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of the Eagles.

title: Elton John: Live in London 2013
subTitle: Filmed at the Roundhouse in London, this concert film gives fans a live experience from start to finish; Elton John performs his hits: "Tiny Dancer," "Rocket Man," "Your Song," and many more.

title: Green Day: Live at Fox Theater
subTitle: Green Day peforms from "21st Century Breakdown", at the Fox Theater in the band's hometown, Oakland, California.

title: The Offspring: Rock AM
subTitle: The Offspring is an American rock band from California; originally formed under the name Manic Subsidal, the band's lineup consists of lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist Bryan Holland, bassist Todd Morse and lead guitarist Kevin Wasserman.

subTitle: The Canadian rock band Billy Talent performs as part of the annual Rock Am Ring festival at Nürburgring Race Track in western Germany.

title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood - Live from Madison Square Garden
subTitle: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out 3-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in February 2008 when Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969.

title: Beck -- Live in London 2014
subTitle: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans an experience; Beck performs his hits including "Loser," "Wave," "Debra" and many more.

title: Milky Chance - Live Garorock Festival 2017
subTitle: The German duet is back and better than ever! Milky Chance is the success story of two school friends, Clemens Rehbein and Philipp Dausch. After a long break, 2017 marks the release of a second, long-waited, album Blossom.

title: Britney Spears - Live from London
subTitle: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including Baby One More Time, Oops! I Did It Again, Toxic and many more.

title: Lana Del Rey - Live in London 2012
subTitle: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success; In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year.

title: Hall & Oates - Live at The Sydney Entertainment Centre
subTitle: Daryl Hall and John Oates wisely reunited a few years ago after a string of solo projects, & they put on the kind of show that makes it hard to believe they even considered going their separate ways. Here they are at the Sydney Entertainment Centre.

title: Depeche Mode - Rock Am Ring

title: Seal - Live at Soundstage
subTitle: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career.
